author: Joshua Whitley
dependencies:
package.xml: <?xml version="1.0"?>
<?xml-model href="http://download.ros.org/schema/package_format3.xsd" schematypens="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"?>
<package format="3">
  <name>acado_vendor</name>
  <version>0.0.0</version>
  <description>A wrapper around the ACADO toolkit</description>
  <maintainer email="whitleysoftwareservices@gmail.com">Josh Whitley</maintainer>
  <license>LGPL</license>
  <author email="christopherj.ho@gmail.com">Christopher Ho</author>
  <author email="whitleysoftwareservices@gmail.com">Josh Whitley</author>

  <buildtool_depend>ament_cmake_auto</buildtool_depend>

  <test_depend>ament_lint_auto</test_depend>
  <test_depend>ament_lint_common</test_depend>

  <export>
    <build_type>ament_cmake</build_type>
  </export>
</package>


CMakeLists.txt: cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.5)
project(acado_vendor)

# Default to C99
if(NOT CMAKE_C_STANDARD)
  set(CMAKE_C_STANDARD 99)
endif()

# Default to C++14
if(NOT CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD)
  set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 14)
endif()

if(CMAKE_COMPILER_IS_GNUCXX OR CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_ID MATCHES "Clang")
  add_compile_options(-Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic)
endif()

# find dependencies
find_package(ament_cmake_auto REQUIRED)

list(APPEND extra_cmake_args -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE})

if(DEFINED CMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE)
  list(APPEND extra_cmake_args "-DCMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE=${CMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE}")
endif()

message("extra_cmake_args: ${extra_cmake_args} ====")

include(ExternalProject)

ExternalProject_Add(acado-1.2.2-beta
  GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/acado/acado.git
  GIT_TAG 5adb8cbcff5a5464706a48eaf073218ac87c9044
  GIT_SHALLOW 1
  TIMEOUT 600
  CMAKE_ARGS
    -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/acado_external_project_install
    -DCMAKE_C_FLAGS="-w"
    -DCMAKE_CXX_FLAGS="-w"
    ${extra_cmake_args}
    -Wno-dev
)
install(DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/acado_external_project_install/
  DESTINATION ${CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX})

ExternalProject_Add(hpmpc-cho3
  GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/gaif/hpmpc.git
  GIT_TAG 3cd096f4fa2ad19995ccc1d3930307f0d372e416
  GIT_SHALLOW 1
  TIMEOUT 600
  CMAKE_ARGS
    -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/hpmpc_external_project_install
    -DCMAKE_C_FLAGS="-w"
    -DCMAKE_CXX_FLAGS="-w"
    ${extra_cmake_args}
    -Wno-dev
)
install(DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/hpmpc_external_project_install/
  DESTINATION ${CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX})

ament_export_include_directories(include)
ament_export_libraries(
  acado_toolkit_s # For code generation
  hpmpc
)

# Install cmake helper functions
install(
  DIRECTORY cmake
  DESTINATION share/${PROJECT_NAME}
)

ament_auto_package(
  CONFIG_EXTRAS "acado_vendor-extras.cmake"
)

author: vincentrou
dependencies:
package.xml: <?xml version="1.0"?>
<?xml-model href="http://download.ros.org/schema/package_format3.xsd" schematypens="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"?>
<package format="3">
  <name>ackermann_msgs</name>
  <version>2.0.2</version>
  <description>ROS2 messages for robots using Ackermann steering.</description>

  <maintainer email="vincentrou@gmail.com">Vincent Rousseau</maintainer>
  <author>Jack O'Quin</author>
  <license>BSD</license>

  <buildtool_depend>ament_cmake</buildtool_depend>
  <buildtool_depend>rosidl_default_generators</buildtool_depend>

  <build_depend>std_msgs</build_depend>

  <exec_depend>rosidl_default_runtime</exec_depend>
  <exec_depend>std_msgs</exec_depend>

  <test_depend>ament_lint_common</test_depend>

  <member_of_group>rosidl_interface_packages</member_of_group>

  <export>
    <build_type>ament_cmake</build_type>
  </export>
</package>


CMakeLists.txt: cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.15)

project(ackermann_msgs)

# Default to C++17
if(NOT CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD)
  set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 17)
endif()

if(CMAKE_COMPILER_IS_GNUCXX OR CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_ID MATCHES "Clang")
  add_compile_options(-Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic)
endif()

find_package(ament_cmake REQUIRED)
find_package(rosidl_default_generators REQUIRED)

find_package(std_msgs REQUIRED)

rosidl_generate_interfaces(${PROJECT_NAME}
  "msg/AckermannDrive.msg"
  "msg/AckermannDriveStamped.msg"
  DEPENDENCIES std_msgs
  ADD_LINTER_TESTS
)

ament_export_dependencies(rosidl_default_runtime)

ament_package()

  <author>Jack O'Quin</author>
  <license>BSD</license>

  <buildtool_depend>ament_cmake</buildtool_depend>
  <buildtool_depend>rosidl_default_generators</buildtool_depend>

  <build_depend>std_msgs</build_depend>

  <exec_depend>rosidl_default_runtime</exec_depend>
  <exec_depend>std_msgs</exec_depend>

  <test_depend>ament_lint_common</test_depend>

  <member_of_group>rosidl_interface_packages</member_of_group>

  <export>
    <build_type>ament_cmake</build_type>
  </export>
</package>


CMakeLists.txt: cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.15)

project(ackermann_msgs)

# Default to C++17
if(NOT CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD)
  set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 17)
endif()

if(CMAKE_COMPILER_IS_GNUCXX OR CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_ID MATCHES "Clang")
  add_compile_options(-Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic)
endif()

find_package(ament_cmake REQUIRED)
find_package(rosidl_default_generators REQUIRED)

find_package(std_msgs REQUIRED)

rosidl_generate_interfaces(${PROJECT_NAME}
  "msg/AckermannDrive.msg"
  "msg/AckermannDriveStamped.msg"
  DEPENDENCIES std_msgs
  ADD_LINTER_TESTS
)

ament_export_dependencies(rosidl_default_runtime)

ament_package()
